name: done
description: Finish a worktree session: retrospective/save, kill window, and remove worktree; use sleep/kill for non-worktree shutdown.
author: Soul-Brews-Studio

cli.help: maw done <window-name> [--force] [--dry-run] | maw done --all [--force] [--dry-run] — finish worktrees; see maw sleep/kill for non-worktree shutdown
